quizzes.title: GMAT Quantitative
quizzes.description: GMAT Focus Quant — Problem Solving: algebra, arithmetic, number properties, and word problems.

quizzes.title: GMAT Verbal
quizzes.description: GMAT Focus Verbal — Critical Reasoning and Reading Comprehension (no Sentence Correction).

quizzes.title: GMAT Data Insights
quizzes.description: Data Sufficiency, Two-Part Analysis, Graphics Interpretation, Table Analysis, and Multi-Source Reasoning.

quizzes.title: GRE Verbal Reasoning
quizzes.description: Vocabulary in context, sentence logic, and reading comprehension passages.

quizzes.title: GRE Quantitative
quizzes.description: Compare two quantities and problem-solving with arithmetic, algebra, and data.

quizzes.title: SAT Math
quizzes.description: Linear equations, functions, and geometry — including diagram-based questions.

quizzes.title: SAT Reading & Writing
quizzes.description: Reading comprehension, grammar, and effective expression.
